top_signals.title: Treasuries Decline as Trump’s Iran Threats Stoke Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Treasuries fell after President Donald Trump again threatened military action against Iran over Hezbollah’s attacks on Israel, prompting investors to reassess inflation risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Doorsteps by President von der Leyen with President Zelenskyy ahead of the EUCO meeting of 18-19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Brussels, 18 Jun 2026 I also want to join those who congratulate Ukraine for opening the first cluster. This is a big step forward. Congratulations, and you deserve it because you ha...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan’s Lipikhina Sees Europe Stocks Lagging Despite Oil Drop
top_signals.summary: European equities may struggle to keep pace with US and emerging market peers in the second half of the year as falling oil prices threaten a key source of earnings growth, according to Nataliia Lipikhina at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: what the Scope Systems cyber attack reveals about mining’s digital fragility
top_signals.summary: The recent ransomware attack targeting Scope Systems’ ERP software stack disrupted operations at dozens of mostly Australian mining companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Secret Network bridge exploited for $4.7M with ‘infinite mint’ bug
top_signals.summary: An exploit of the Secret Network went undiscovered for a week as the hacker moved the loot into Ethereum and then to exchanges.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Monzo taps into English cricket with The Hundred sponsorship
top_signals.summary: English cricket chiefs have added Monzo as a partner for The Hundred ahead of the sixth season of the white-ball competition. Monzo has become the official banking partner of The Hundred and will have in-stadium branding whenever the Decision Review System is implemented. The digital bank has a growing presence in sport and is the [...]
